name: mediflow
description: E-commerce B2C de medicamentos OTC (tabletas) en Panamá

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c blue,green "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.typecheck: bun --filter @mediflow/shared typecheck && bun --filter @mediflow/backend typecheck && bun --filter @mediflow/frontend typecheck
